description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~103k production LoC across 142 files; ~15k test LoC across 24 suites (including AK3 regression suites, AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite, AK7 foundational regression suite, AK8 model integrity suite, and the AK9 platform regression suite `tests/Ak9PlatformSuite.lean` — 34 end-to-end checks); ~3,045 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) — pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, 76 MED, 101 LOW = 202 findings per E-6 errata). **WS-AK Phases AK1–AK10 COMPLETE** (v0.29.1–v0.30.6); portfolio closed. [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md).

**Active workstream:** **WS-AK Phase AK10 COMPLETE — PORTFOLIO CLOSED** (v0.30.6) — Testing, Documentation & Closure. Phase AK10 closes the 10-phase WS-AK remediation portfolio (202 findings). AK10-A fixture verification (227-line byte-identical match); AK10-B doc sync across README + 10 i18n + SELE4N_SPEC + WORKSTREAM_HISTORY + GitBook + CHANGELOG; AK10-C **patch-only** version bump v0.30.5 → v0.30.6 per maintainer direction (v1.0.0 release tag deferred to manual maintainer action); AK10-D `AUDIT_v0.29.0_ERRATA.md` with six clarifications; AK10-E CLAUDE.md large-file list refresh; AK10-F residual LOW verification (zero `sorry`/`axiom`/`native_decide`); AK10-G website manifest PASS; AK10-H WORKSTREAM_HISTORY WS-AK portfolio summary; AK10-J `AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md` with 11 items (7 hardware-binding; 4 proof-hygiene) — all recorded as **post-1.0 hardening candidates; no currently-active plan file tracks them** (WS-V and AG10 are both closed workstreams per WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md). Prior: AK9 (v0.30.4–v0.30.5), AK8 (v0.30.1–v0.30.3), WS-AM (v0.30.0), WS-AL (v0.29.14), AK7 (v0.29.13), AK6 (v0.29.9 + v0.29.12), AK5 (v0.29.5–v0.29.6), AK4 (v0.29.4–v0.29.8), AK3 (v0.29.3), AK2 (v0.29.2), AK1 (v0.29.1), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1–v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7–v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2–v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0–v0.27.1), WS-AF–WS-B. **Next:** hardware-binding / proof-hygiene items tracked per-ID in `AUDIT_v0.29.0_DEFERRED.md`.
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
